title: Poshan Tracker
description: Professional Project • Contributed to the development and optimization of India's national nutrition platform by building scalable backend services and cloud-native integrations.
fullDescription: Professional Project developed as part of my role at Digital India Corporation (MeitY). Contributed to the design, development, and maintenance of scalable backend services powering the Poshan Tracker ecosystem. Responsibilities included developing RESTful APIs, building high-performance microservices, integrating national digital health initiatives such as ABHA (M1, M2, M3, Bal ABHA) and U-WIN, implementing transactional workflows with AWS DynamoDB, optimizing database queries for millisecond-level response times, and integrating RabbitMQ for asynchronous processing. Worked extensively with Laravel, Fastify, Redis, AWS services, and Jenkins-based CI/CD pipelines while implementing security enhancements, cloud storage integrations, and large-scale beneficiary registration modules serving millions of users. This project strengthened expertise in distributed systems, cloud-native application development, performance optimization, and enterprise software engineering.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A responsive single-page portfolio in vanilla JS and Tailwind CSS, with JSON-driven content, deployed on AWS with automated CI/CD.
fullDescription: A responsive single-page application (SPA) built with vanilla JavaScript (ES6+) and Tailwind CSS, featuring client-side routing, JSON-driven content, dynamic project modals, dark/light theme support, and smooth animations with self-hosted Lucide icons. The contact form is powered by the Web3Forms API, so no backend is required. Deployed on AWS using S3 for static hosting and CloudFront for global CDN distribution, with GitHub Actions handling CI/CD that syncs to S3 and invalidates the CloudFront cache on every push to main.

title: XIRR Calculator
description: A secure Spring Boot web application that calculates XIRR from Excel-based mutual fund transactions with user management and cloud deployment.
fullDescription: A production-ready financial web application built with Spring Boot that calculates Extended Internal Rate of Return (XIRR) for irregular mutual fund cash flows using the Newton-Raphson and Bisection algorithms. The platform features role-based authentication with Spring Security, an administrative dashboard for user lifecycle management, configurable account expiry, password recovery via email verification, automated account provisioning, and in-memory rate limiting for enhanced security. Transaction workbooks are processed entirely in memory without persistent storage, while user data is securely stored in Neon PostgreSQL with BCrypt password hashing. The application is server-side rendered using Thymeleaf, integrates the Brevo API for transactional HTML emails, and is deployed on Render with Docker support, providing a scalable and secure cloud-native architecture.

title: DigiBot
description: An AI-powered document assistant that enables semantic search and conversational question answering over PDF documents using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
fullDescription: DigiBot is an intelligent document assistant that leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to provide context-aware answers from uploaded PDF documents. The application extracts document content, generates semantic embeddings, and stores them in a vector database for efficient similarity search. User queries retrieve the most relevant document chunks, which are supplied to a Large Language Model to generate accurate, context-aware responses while minimizing hallucinations. The project features an interactive web interface, secure document processing, conversational chat history, and a scalable architecture for enterprise knowledge management, research assistance, and document-based question answering.

title: NFC Payment Application
description: An Android application that enables secure NFC-based contactless payments using encryption, authentication, and real-time transaction processing.
fullDescription: A secure Android application designed to demonstrate Near Field Communication (NFC) based contactless payments for e-commerce and digital transactions. The application implements encrypted communication, secure user authentication, and transaction validation to protect sensitive payment data during NFC interactions. It follows a modular architecture with dedicated components for authentication, payment processing, and NFC communication, providing a practical implementation of secure contactless payment workflows. Developed as part of postgraduate research, the project showcases mobile application development, NFC integration, payment security principles, and modern Android architecture.

title: Elite Creative Group
description: A modern, responsive business website for a creative agency featuring engaging UI, smooth animations, and an optimized user experience.
fullDescription: Elite Creative Group is a responsive business website designed for a creative agency to showcase its services, portfolio, and brand identity through a modern user interface. The application focuses on delivering an engaging user experience with responsive layouts, smooth animations, intuitive navigation, and visually appealing design elements. Built using modern frontend technologies, the project demonstrates best practices in responsive web development, performance optimization, and clean component-based organization, making it suitable for businesses seeking a professional online presence.
